Return JSON only."}

{"next_best_action": [{"action_type": "forge_authentication_token", "target": "access_token cookie", "rationale": "Token is unsigned base64 encoded company ID, so a valid admin token can be forged by encoding company ID 2 to match expected format"}, {"action_type": "run_prebuilt_exploit", "target": "provided Python exploit script", "rationale": "Pre-built script automates token forging, request sending and flag extraction as an alternative to manual exploitation"}]}
